prompt:
A freshly built pine planter box sits on a woodworking bench. The rectangular box has clean mitred corners, smooth sanded boards, and small drainage holes visible along the bottom edge. A bottle of waterproof wood glue and a clamp lie nearby, hinting at how it was assembled. The solarpunk workshop background is softly blurred with warm light, hints of greenery outside a window, and a few neatly hung tools without any text or logos.

Render a 512×512 photorealistic image with gentle stylization that keeps the planter box as the focal point and communicates that it is ready for soil and plants.
